feed.title: june’s blog
feed.subtitle: June's thoughts, ramblings and other musings.

entry.title: funemployment
entry.content:
hello again!

A 5 year comeback! Hopefully I won’t wait another 5 until my next post. Going aganist all asian mothers’ wishes worldwide, I recently quit my job after 3.5 ish months. Was it scary and should I have proceeded with more caution? Probably. But going with all asian daughters wishes worldwide, I’ve simply acting in-line with doing the opposite of what mom told me to do.

but why?

Read the last sentence of the first paragraph

I’m hoping this is a time for profound reflection and rejeventation. Something that has been top of mind for me is the saying “know thyself”
entry.summary: hello again! A 5 year comeback! Hopefully I won’t wait another 5 until my next post. Going aganist all asian mothers’ wishes worldwide, I recently quit my job after 3.5 ish months. Was it scary and should I have proceeded with more caution? Probably. But going with all asian daughters wishes worldwide, I’ve simply acting in-line with doing the opposite of what mom told me to do.

entry.title: hello world
entry.content:
I couldn’t think of a cornier way to start this first post. This is what 2 braincells at 12:42 in the morning accomplishes. And yes, if you’re wondering, I am proud of myself.

To simply put it in illustrations, I feel like a cross between:

and

Besides, being delirious never hurt anyone.

The important thing today is that it marks a new era. The beginning of this blog. Or maybe the end of me as we know it. We’ll see. Stay tuned.
entry.summary: I couldn’t think of a cornier way to start this first post. This is what 2 braincells at 12:42 in the morning accomplishes. And yes, if you’re wondering, I am proud of myself.
